200.description: Your order has been placed successfully.

post.summary: Add an item to the cart
post.description:
Adds either a product or a package to the user's cart depending on the presence of the variant ID. NOTE: Variant ID of the product.  
     *                 If omitted, the request is treated as adding a **package** to the cart.  
     *                 If provided, the request is treated as adding a **product** to the cart.
     *                 If both variant_id and quantity are omitted, product of cheapest variant item is added.

slug.description: Unique slug identifier for the product or package.

variant_id.description:
Variant ID of the product.  
     *                 If omitted, the request is treated as adding a **package** to the cart.  
     *                 If provided, the request is treated as adding a **product** to the cart.

quantity.description: Number of items to add to the cart.

200.description: Item has been added to cart

message.example: Item has been added to cart

data.description: Data payload (null if no cart details returned)

success.description: Indicates if the operation was successful
